blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,935 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
